did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper describes a data descriptor for the Mole Mapper Study, which collected participant-provided images and measurements using an iPhone app built on Apple's ResearchKit. The study results (demographic associations, mole size measurements) were obtained through self-reporting surveys and manual image curation by human curators. While the authors mention future directions including 'automated mole detection' and hope to engage researchers in 'computer vision' and 'machine learning', the paper itself does not report using AI/ML/DL to obtain the current study results.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
